title: Ding-a-ling. Financial Santa is in the house, but does he also bring rate cuts?
section_path: Ding-a-ling. Financial Santa is in the house, but does he also bring rate cuts?
section_path_text: Ding-a-ling. Financial Santa is in the house, but does he also bring rate cuts?
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things investors need to know this week
The combination of a rate pause confirmation along with a fiscal year-end for funds and short positioning catalysed a broad-based asset rally. The next big question for investors is now: when are the rate cuts? A market expectation of ten months seems reasonable on paper.
